response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the character dialogue and on-screen game text. 2. Reference JSON correctly identifies the absence of vocal music. 3. Subtitles focus on character banter, game-specific text prompts, and the tongue twister challenge. 4. Timing is tightly wrapped to vocal delivery and visual cues, ensuring no early cutoffs or overlap during pauses.

subtitles.original: Yes, it's time for Justice!
subtitles.english: Yes, it's time for Justice!

subtitles.english: Show you what I'm made of! Master!

subtitles.original: You got this. I'll tell, tell you...
subtitles.english: You got this. I'll tell, tell you...

subtitles.original: ...and then you sell it. Or she's already got it.
subtitles.english: ...and then you sell it. Or she's already got it.

subtitles.english: Wait, wait, what? Go!

subtitles.english: What's that? What's there? You got this!

subtitles.english: Now, pose to disarm the bomb!!!

subtitles.english: ...and they just get to do whatever they want?

subtitles.original: Level 4: Disarm the bomb with a tongue twister!
subtitles.english: Level 4: Disarm the bomb with a tongue twister!

subtitles.original: Fuzzy Wuzzy was a bear. Fuzzy Wuzzy had no hair.
subtitles.english: Fuzzy Wuzzy was a bear. Fuzzy Wuzzy had no hair.

subtitles.original: Fuzzy Wuzzy wasn't fuzzy, was he? Wuzzy! DEFUSED!
subtitles.english: Fuzzy Wuzzy wasn't fuzzy, was he? Wuzzy! DEFUSED!

subtitles.original: I'm ready. Fuzzy wuzzy, fuzzy wuzzy was a bear.
subtitles.english: I'm ready. Fuzzy wuzzy, fuzzy wuzzy was a bear.

subtitles.original: Fuzzy wuzzy was a bear. I can't remember the rest.
subtitles.english: Fuzzy wuzzy was a bear. I can't remember the rest.

subtitles.original: Boots and cats and boots and cats...
subtitles.english: Boots and cats and boots and cats...

subtitles.original: Fuzzy wuzzy, was a bear, didn't see him anywhere.
subtitles.english: Fuzzy wuzzy, was a bear, didn't see him anywhere.

subtitles.original: I'm the Queen of Justice and... what rhymes with just?
subtitles.english: I'm the Queen of Justice and... what rhymes with just?

subtitles.original: That's just... you know what rhymes with justice.
subtitles.english: That's just... you know what rhymes with justice.

subtitles.original: Just eyes! Get out of here. Yeah, just eyes!
subtitles.english: Just eyes! Get out of here. Yeah, just eyes!

subtitles.original: Level 5. Alright! Okay, okay, okay, okay. Difficult.
subtitles.english: Level 5. Alright! Okay, okay, okay, okay. Difficult.

subtitles.original: This the light one, and then I need the pink one...

subtitles.english: ...and the blue one. Oh wait, get out of here!

subtitles.original: Got it, you got it! I need this one! I need this one!
subtitles.english: Got it, you got it! I need this one! I need this one!

subtitles.original: And I need... Got it, you got it!
subtitles.english: And I need... Got it, you got it!

subtitles.original: No, no, no! Everything's falling apart!
subtitles.english: No, no, no! Everything's falling apart!

subtitles.original: No, it's not falling apart. No, you can do it...
subtitles.english: No, it's not falling apart. No, you can do it...

subtitles.original: ...you can still do it. Did I get it? No! Alright!
subtitles.english: ...you can still do it. Did I get it? No! Alright!

subtitles.original: I have a star! Yes! BOOM! What the freak?
subtitles.english: I have a star! Yes! BOOM! What the freak?

subtitles.original: No! Get out of here, get out of here.
subtitles.english: No! Get out of here, get out of here.

subtitles.original: That's fine. I mean, yeah, that's fine. Well, whatever.
subtitles.english: That's fine. I mean, yeah, that's fine. Well, whatever.

subtitles.original: It's... I got to Level 5. Kick them, kick them!
subtitles.english: It's... I got to Level 5. Kick them, kick them!

subtitles.original: Kick them! I didn't want to do math anyway. It's fine.
subtitles.english: Kick them! I didn't want to do math anyway. It's fine.

subtitles.original: I didn't want to do math anyway. It's fine, it's fine.
subtitles.english: I didn't want to do math anyway. It's fine, it's fine.

subtitles.original: I got some math for you... 10 points!
subtitles.english: I got some math for you... 10 points!

subtitles.original: 10 points! Yay! Whoo! Master! Alright!
subtitles.english: 10 points! Yay! Whoo! Master! Alright!

subtitles.original: That was... I think that's pretty good.
subtitles.english: That was... I think that's pretty good.

subtitles.original: Simmer down, buttercups! You still got the final trial!
subtitles.english: Simmer down, buttercups! You still got the final trial!

subtitles.original: Quizzes and tests! We don't want to do math anymore!
subtitles.english: Quizzes and tests! We don't want to do math anymore!

subtitles.original: We just want to relax. I'm getting tired.
subtitles.english: We just want to relax. I'm getting tired.

subtitles.original: Ice cream, ice cream. Let's go.
subtitles.english: Ice cream, ice cream. Let's go.

subtitles.original: I want ice cream now, Boss. What the freak? Hey!
subtitles.english: I want ice cream now, Boss. What the freak? Hey!

subtitles.original: Hey! Hey! I'm the only one still burnt up.
subtitles.english: Hey! Hey! I'm the only one still burnt up.

subtitles.english: Can I go shower real quick before the next game?

subtitles.english: I don't smell like a burnt cheeky chicken anymore!
